name: Bank of America Corporation Depositary shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of 4.375% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series NN
summary: Bank of America Corporation Depositary shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of 4.375% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series NN represents a series of preferred stock issued by Bank of America. These preferred shares offer a fixed dividend payment and have a preference over common stock in the event of liquidation. The depositary shares represent a fractional ownership in the underlying preferred shares.
